summary: Full backend and frontend testing of RepoDoctor app. All 8 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows work: dashboard loads with stats, navigation works, new analysis submission redirects to detail page, agent stepper shows all 5 steps, tabs (Bugs/Fixes/Logs) are functional, settings page has 3 inputs and save button.
action_items: Add data-testid='status-badge' to status badge in AnalysisDetail.jsx
Add data-testid='settings-save-btn' to save button in Settings.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well-structured at 233 lines, within limits
All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field
Stats endpoint aggregation pipeline looks correct
seed_data_creation: Two analyses created via test runs (mgedmin/check-python-versions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 8/8 tests pass. Frontend fully functional. Agent stepper shows all 5 steps (Observe/Decide/Act/Verify/Create PR). Analysis submission and live polling works. Known analysis ID: 565ba6c6-7898-42a6-8d12-e38ce370e31b. No auth required. Minor missing data-testid on status badge and settings save button.
